rationale: The candidate correctly identified 7 works with all 3 variants, but the corpus actually has 9 such works — Bang-E-Dara Part 1 (allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-1-55b25c, variant_types: original=44, translation=43, transliteration=44) and Bang-E-Dara Part 2 (allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c, variant_types: original=28, translation=27, transliteration=28) were both omitted. The brief's notes explicitly state 'Iqbal Bang-E-Dara parts have all 3', making this a meaningful factual gap. The reasoning chain was sensible (get_metadata per work), but the candidate apparently checked only Part 3 and missed Parts 1 and 2.
